children.text: The term “Board of Regents” means the Board of Regents of the Smithsonian Institution.

The term “Congressional Commission” means the Commission to Study the Potential Creation of a National Women’s History Museum, established under section 3056 of the Military Construction Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2015 (; ).Public Law 113–291128 Stat. 3810
The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Smithsonian Institution.
